welcome.title: Art and Reasoning
welcome.text: I am a student at the Renaissance School of Art and Reasoning. My work exists in the space where creative expression meets structured logic.

about.title: The Creative Process
about.text: Art has always been my primary way of processing the world around me. I focus on how reasoning and logic provide a skeleton for creative 'flesh'.

skills.label: Foundations
skills.content: Proficient in watercolor techniques, charcoal sketching, and light theory study.

resume.label: Education
resume.content: Renaissance School of Art and Reasoning — Class of 2027

contact.title: Studio Inquiry
contact.text: Thank you for visiting! Please use the form below for inquiries or collaborations.
